data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the integration with onboarding workflows, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this integration is implemented or functioning. The absence of supporting evidence indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary functionality is not demonstrated in the provided data.
gaps: No evidence of integration with onboarding workflows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
